projectDescription: A community-maintained database of security advisories for Ruby gems and Ruby implementations, structured as YAML files and used by tools like bundler-audit to detect vulnerable dependencies.
keyFeatures: Community-maintained YAML advisory files for 435+ Ruby gems
Coverage for multiple Ruby implementations: MRI, JRuby, mruby, TruffleRuby
CVE, GHSA, and OSVDB identifier support
Kwalify schema validation with RSpec test suite
Used by bundler-audit for Gemfile.lock vulnerability scanning
publicApiSurface: gems/<gem-name>/<CVE-ID>.yml — advisory file for a Ruby gem
rubies/<engine>/<CVE-ID>.yml — advisory file for a Ruby implementation
GitHub::GitHubAdvisorySync.sync(min_year:, gem_name:) — sync from GitHub Advisory API
rake sync_github_advisories[gem_name] — Rake task to sync GitHub advisories
bundle exec rspec — run the advisory validation test suite
YAML fields: gem, cve, ghsa, url, title, date, description, cvss_v3, patched_versions, unaffected_versions
